mapper.select: SELECT CODE, PLANTCD, INSP_TP, ITEMGUBUN, TESTITEMGP, TESTITEM, GAUGE, STANDARD, USEYN, REGUSERID, REGDTM, EDITUSERID, EDITDTM, FAILTYPE, FAILBREAKDOWN FROM TBL_INSP_ITEM WHERE CODE = #{CODE}
SELECT 'INSP-' + #{date_str} + '-' + RIGHT('000' + CAST(ISNULL(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(CODE, 3) AS INT)), 0) + 1 AS VARCHAR), 3) AS NEW_CODE FROM TBL_INSP_ITEM WHERE CODE LIKE 'INSP-' + #{date_str} + '-%'
